section.class: s_text_image o_colored_level o_cc o_cc1 pt32 pb0

span.font: E S T . 1 9 5 2 · K A R A I K A L , TA M I L N A D U

div.p: Hand-made in small batches with pure cow ghee, jaggery, and recipes passed down three generations. From Mysore Pak to Murukku — the real thing, delivered fresh.

a.style: border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0;

div.class: col-lg-5 o_colored_level pt0 pb0 rounded o_cc o_cc1

p.font: S H O P  B Y  C AT E G O R Y

section.class: s_dynamic_snippet_products s_dynamic s_dynamic_empty pb32 o_colored_level s_product_product_borderless_1 pt0 o_dynamic_snippet_empty
s_dynamic_snippet_title oe_unremovable oe_unmovable d-flex flex-column flex-md-row mb-lg-0 pb-md-0 o_colored_level pb48 justify-content-between pt24

p.font: B E S T  S E L L E R S

section.class: s_dynamic_snippet_content oe_unremovable oe_unmovable o_not_editable col o_colored_level

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info fade show d-none d-print-none rounded-0 o_default_snippet_text

div.div: Your Dynamic Snippet will be displayed here... This message is displayed because you did not provide both a filter and a template to use.

section.class: s_text_image pt64 pb64 o_colored_level d-none o_snippet_mobile_invisible d-lg-block

p.font: O U R  S T O R Y

div.p: It started with a single shop opposite the Karaikal Ammaiyar temple and a small copper kadai that Grandfather Raghavan refused to retire. Seventy-three years later, we still cook in copper, still use the same jaggery supplier from Kumbakonam, and still close for an hour every afternoon — because some things you don't rush.
Today, the third generation runs the kitchens. The recipes haven't changed. Just the number of people we get to feed.

p.font: D I WA L I · L I M I T E D E D I T I O N

h2.strong: The Karaikal Hamper — twelve of our most loved.

div.p: Hand-packed in a reusable brass-finish tin. Ships across India in cold-chain carriers.

section.class: s_company_team_detail o_cc o_cc1 o_colored_level pt32 pb0

p.font: F R O M  O U R  R E G U L A R S

div.div: "The Mysore Pak melts before you finish a sentence. My grandmother's seal of approval — and she's 91."
"Ordered the Diwali hamper for my team in Bangalore. Gone in a day. The thattai especially — crisp, not greasy."
"I grew up on their murukku. Living in Boston now, they ship it in perfect condition. Tastes like 1998."
"Best adhirasam I've had outside my hometown. Soft inside, perfectly fried outside."
"Authentic taste and amazing packaging. Reached Hyderabad fresh and crisp."
"The Mysore Pak melts before you finish a sentence. My grandmother's seal of approval — and she's 91."
"Ordered the Diwali hamper for my team in Bangalore. Gone in a day. The thattai especially — crisp, not greasy."
"I grew up on their murukku. Living in Boston now, they ship it in perfect condition. Tastes like 1998."
"Best adhirasam I've had outside my hometown. Soft inside, perfectly fried outside."
"Authentic taste and amazing packaging. Reached Hyderabad fresh and crisp."

p.font: V I S I T  U S
